prompt: Implement LRUSet in model.py for one cache set. Lines are numbered from 0 through ways-1. touch marks a line most recently used. victim must return the least recently touched line, preferring never-touched lines in ascending line order. invalidate makes a line eligible as never touched. Reject invalid line numbers and non-positive associativity.
instruction: Implement LRUSet in model.py for one cache set. Lines are numbered from 0 through ways-1. touch marks a line most recently used. victim must return the least recently touched line, preferring never-touched lines in ascending line order. invalidate makes a line eligible as never touched. Reject invalid line numbers and non-positive associativity.
